strengths: Strong technical stack: Python, SQL, Snowflake, BigQuery
Proven automation and ETL/ELT delivery with CI/CD
Experience with KPIs, reporting, and data governance
weaknesses: Minimal management consulting or program management background
Title mismatch for Senior Consulting Analyst level
improvement_bullets: Evaluated and integrated AI-driven automation tools to streamline business operations, contributing to a 40% improvement in work efficiency.
Partnered with project managers to facilitate enterprise change, utilizing Jira and SharePoint for program management and cross-functional team coordination.
Conducted market research on Insurtech trends to identify opportunities for data modernization, directly informing process improvement initiatives.
Facilitated stakeholder workshops and translated technical requirements into actionable project roadmaps to ensure alignment with organizational strategic objectives.
Spearheaded the assessment of emerging technologies and proof-of-concept pilots, analyzing outcomes to support data-backed recommendations for executive leadership.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Consulting Analyst opportunity with Starr. I am interested in this opportunity because of Starr’s reputation as a global leader in commercial insurance and its commitment to driving value through digital innovation. What interests me about working for Starr is its entrepreneurial culture and focus on leveraging data modernization to solve complex client challenges. I believe my expertise in data-driven process automation and my proficiency in bridging the gap between technical teams and business operations would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating complex technical datasets into actionable strategic recommendations. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I developed a statistical model to identify high-value customer segments and automated reporting pipelines, which directly led to a 300% increase in revenue for that segment and saved 8 hours of manual work per week. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Consulting Analyst role at Starr would allow me to bring my analytical background to complex enterprise transformation initiatives. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead enabled me to develop my stakeholder communication and program management skills. I facilitated cross-functional meetings to align departmental KPIs, ensuring a single source of truth for all business stakeholders. By standardizing these data governance frameworks, I reduced report discrepancies and enhanced project transparency, skills which are essential for coordinating enterprise-wide technology adoption at Starr. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in AI-driven process automation in working on large-scale transformation initiatives at Starr. I know that my technical proficiency and commitment to strategic alignment match what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss how my experience in technology enablement can support the Transformation Office. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
